title: CadStruct-MoE SCI2 强投稿针对性强化计划 v8

decision.is_model_mature_for_submission: 强可投稿原型，但不能负责任地判断为 SCI2 99% 中稿率成熟稿。
why_not_99_percent_ready: 近两年 WAFFLE/ResPlan 等工作把 floorplan understanding 推向 in-the-wild、多源、多模态和 graph/vector benchmark；v3 已确认 external OCR 与 cross-source symbol annotation pack 可复现，但 human-gold 仍为 0，外部泛化 claim 仍必须阻断。
主指标已经强：node macro F1=0.951696、node accuracy=0.981566、no-repair relation F1=0.920938、invalid graph rate=0.0；但论文审稿风险不只看本地 locked split，还看外部泛化和可复现对比。
Lie/SE(2) gated residual 已有真实 matched 性能提升，v9 完成 true graph-coordinate transform stress；结果支持 identity/matched 性能提升，但不支持大幅坐标变换泛化。
MoE 差异化优势是 domain-structured deterministic routing + typed experts，不是通用 sparse-token MoE；需要把 expert contribution、wrong-family cost、router audit 做成主文级 evidence，而不是只放 appendix。

lie_se2_gated_residual.claim: explicit gated Lie/SE(2) residual branch is a core geometry component with matched and seed-30 identity performance support; transform-generalization claim remains limited

external_human_gold_boundary.claim: annotation-ready external protocol; no external/wild generalization performance claim until human gold is filled

domain_structured_moe_main_tables.claim: auditable deterministic domain-structured routing is the main MoE mechanism; learned/top-k routers are ablations/capacity diagnostics

decision.submission_posture: v8 todo 已完成：可以作为强 SCI2 候选稿推进；仍不应承诺 99% 中稿率，外部/wild 泛化需等待 human-gold 标注。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: WAFFLE: Multimodal Floorplan Understanding in the Wild
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: 近 20K in-the-wild floorplan images + metadata，强调多建筑类型、多地区、多数据格式和外部泛化。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: 必须补 external/cross-source human-gold 或明确把 wild generalization 限制住。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: Vision Language Models Can Parse Floor Plan Maps
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: VLM 开始处理 floorplan/map parsing，关注导航式任务、语义区域和连通结构理解。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: 我们的 typed graph/no-repair validity 是差异化，但需要避免和 VLM QA/navigation 任务混用指标。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: Comprehensive floor plan vectorization with sparse point set representation
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: floorplan vectorization 更强调高精度几何、复杂布局和结构化表示。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: 我们的核心不是纯 vectorization SOTA，而是语义 typed scene graph；需要提供 relation/no-repair/typed validity 证据。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: ResPlan: A Large-Scale Vector-Graph Dataset of 17,000 Residential Floor Plans
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: 新数据集直接提供 geometric 与 graph-based formats，推动 spatial reasoning benchmark。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: graph output 是正确方向，但需要展示我们的 graph schema、专家贡献和跨源鲁棒性。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: Routers in Vision Mixture of Experts: An Empirical Study
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: Vision MoE 重点比较 token-choice、expert-choice、soft MoE，并强调 router design 对性能/计算的影响。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: 我们要把 domain-structured routing 的 wrong-family cost、expert utilization、deterministic vs learned router 放进主文。

frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.work: ViMoE: An Empirical Study of Designing Vision Mixture-of-Experts
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.trend: 视觉 MoE 论文越来越重视 expert specialization 和 router behavior。
frontier_literature_snapshot_2024_2026.implication_for_us: 我们应把 expert specialization 作为核心贡献证据，而不是泛称 MoE。

core_innovation_and_differentiation.innovation: Domain-structured MoE for CAD/floorplan typed scene graph
core_innovation_and_differentiation.advantage: 按候选族和工程图元素拆专家，router 可审计；不同于通用 sparse-token MoE。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.current_evidence: 主文 router/contribution/resource 表已生成；deterministic wrong_expert_rate=0.0，learned fair router wrong_expert_rate=0.152302；4 个核心专家有 measured contribution。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.must_strengthen: 若要进一步提升性能，需要针对 symbol_fixture 长尾和外部 human-gold 做训练/标注；当前 MoE 主文证据已可用。

core_innovation_and_differentiation.advantage: 直接输出 typed node + relation graph，invalid graph rate=0.0，不依赖 gold repair。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.must_strengthen: 补 relation hard-case taxonomy、record-level examples、与 rule-only/repair/learned scorer 对照表。

core_innovation_and_differentiation.innovation: Explicit gated Lie/SE(2) residual geometry branch
core_innovation_and_differentiation.advantage: 不是把 Lie 特征混入普通数值向量，而是用 gated residual 显式建模几何子空间。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.current_evidence: h512 matched 3/3 positive，mean +1.822pp；h1024 +1.121pp；seed30 identity gated vs ungated +1.227pp、vs no-Lie +3.319pp。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.must_strengthen: 若要 claim 坐标变换泛化，需要训练期引入一致的 graph-coordinate/raster 联合 SE(2) 增强；当前只能 claim matched/identity 性能提升。

core_innovation_and_differentiation.advantage: 把 main/appendix/diagnostic/pending external claims 分离，降低 overclaim 风险。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.current_evidence: overclaim scan passed；final evidence pack passed。
core_innovation_and_differentiation.must_strengthen: 生成最终 source manifest、paper tables、ablation table、limitation/rebuttal table，并确保 README/docs 同步新 Lie gated claim。

paper_positioning_one_sentence: CadStruct-MoE is an auditable domain-structured mixture-of-experts system for typed CAD/floorplan scene-graph parsing, combining deterministic expert routing, explicit gated Lie/SE(2) geometry, conservative no-repair relation fusion, and claim-ledger reproducibility.

overall_status.readiness: v8 todo completed. Evidence pack v2 passes with stronger gated Lie performance evidence, main-paper MoE tables, external annotation boundary, and zero-blocking overclaim scan.

completed_tasks.note: Completed with real performance lift evidence and explicit transform-generalization limitation per done_when.
Completed per done_when with annotation pack paths and explicit block because no human-gold labels are filled.
Completed by promoting existing measured router/contribution/resource evidence into main-paper tables.
Completed final v2 evidence pack and overclaim scan with new Lie gated metrics and MoE main tables.
